targetProfile.intendedUse: Internal exchange of a staged OHT/IUCLID-aligned JSON preview for review workflows.
notes: Unsupported fields and derived mappings remain review items rather than blockers for internal exchange.

actionItems.title: Upgrade linked dossier readiness
actionItems.summary: The linked version-pinned dossier does not satisfy the dossier-readiness profile required by the selected exchange gate.
actionItems.triggerMessage: Linked dossier readiness assessment requires human review before treating the preview as exchange-ready.

actionItems.title: Review unsupported preview fields
actionItems.summary: Unsupported local-only fields remain in the staged preview workflow and require review before relying on the current gate outcome.
actionItems.triggerMessage: Preview still carries unsupported local-only fields that require review or block the selected gate.

actionItems.title: Replace non-direct mappings
actionItems.summary: Derived or review-required mappings remain in the staged preview and block or downgrade the selected exchange gate.
actionItems.triggerMessage: Preview still depends on derived or review-required mappings that require review or block the selected gate.

Operator guide for reviewer-facing interoperability signoff packets.

notes: Signoff packet is a reviewer-facing overlay on top of the remediation bundle and does not alter the underlying readiness outcome.
Waived actions remain explicitly visible so downstream reviewers can inspect the rationale for any accepted deviation.
Signed-off status does not imply XML generation readiness, submission acceptance, or regulatory approval.
